fields.helpText: This field should contain the word CLOZAPINE.

This is the name of the test associated with Clozapine.  A White Blood  Count and a method of determining the Neutorphil Count must be entered.   You may enter as many of each as are appropriate.  The Neutorphil count  may be and absolute count, a percentage, or the BANDS and SEGS.  If BANDS  and SEGS are entered, a separate test must be entered for each.
